```aura inline width=860 height=580 align=center
<div
  style={{
    width: "100%",
    height: "100%",
    background: "#080808",
    borderRadius: 24,
    border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)",
    display: "flex",
    flexDirection: "column",
    position: "relative",
    overflow: "hidden",
    fontFamily: "Inter, sans-serif",
  }}
>
  <svg
    width="860"
    height="580"
    style={{
      position: "absolute",
      top: 0,
      left: 0,
    }}
  >
    <defs>
      <style>{`
        @keyframes borderBeam {
          0%   { stroke-dashoffset: 2839; }
          100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
        }
        @keyframes borderBeamReverse {
          0%   { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
          100% { stroke-dashoffset: 2839; }
        }
        @keyframes bracketPulse {
          0%, 100% { opacity: 0.2; stroke: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); }
          50%       { opacity: 1;   stroke: #a855f7; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 4px #a855f7); }
        }
        @keyframes breatheAura {
          0%, 100% { opacity: 0; }
          50%       { opacity: 1; }
        }
        .beam-main {
          stroke-dasharray: 200 2639;
          animation: borderBeam 5s linear infinite;
        }
        .beam-blur {
          stroke-dasharray: 200 2639;
          animation: borderBeam 5s linear infinite;
        }
        .beam-secondary {
          stroke-dasharray: 120 2719;
          animation: borderBeamReverse 7s linear infinite;
        }
        .beam-secondary-blur {
          stroke-dasharray: 120 2719;
          animation: borderBeamReverse 7s linear infinite;
        }
        .bracket { animation: bracketPulse 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
        .bracket:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.75s; }
        .bracket:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 1.5s; }
        .bracket:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 2.25s; }
        .aura-overlay      { animation: breatheAura     5s ease-in-out infinite; }
      `}</style>

      <filter id="softGlow" x="-30%" y="-30%" width="160%" height="160%">
        <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="7" result="blur" />
        <feMerge><feMergeNode in="blur"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
      </filter>
      <filter id="beamBlur" x="-10%" y="-10%" width="120%" height="120%">
        <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="4" />
      </filter>

      <linearGradient id="glowGradient" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
        <stop offset="0%"   stopColor="#a855f7" />
        <stop offset="40%"  stopColor="#06b6d4" />
        <stop offset="70%"  stopColor="#7c3aed" />
        <stop offset="100%" stopColor="#a855f7" />
      </linearGradient>
      <linearGradient id="glowGradient2" x1="100%" y1="100%" x2="0%" y2="0%">
        <stop offset="0%"   stopColor="#06b6d4" />
        <stop offset="50%"  stopColor="#a855f7" />
        <stop offset="100%" stopColor="#06b6d4" />
      </linearGradient>
      <radialGradient id="auraGrad" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
        <stop offset="0%"   stopColor="#7c3aed" stopOpacity="0.12" />
        <stop offset="60%"  stopColor="#06b6d4" stopOpacity="0.05" />
        <stop offset="100%" stopColor="transparent" stopOpacity="0" />
      </radialGradient>

      <pattern id="grid" width="48" height="48" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
        <path d="M 48 0 L 0 0 0 48" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.02)" strokeWidth="1" />
      </pattern>
      <pattern id="dotPattern" width="18" height="18" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
        <circle cx="9" cy="9" r="1" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.12)" />
      </pattern>
      <radialGradient id="topLeftGlow" cx="0%" cy="0%" r="100%">
        <stop offset="0%"   stopColor="rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" />
        <stop offset="100%" stopColor="rgba(255,255,255,0)" />
      </radialGradient>
      <radialGradient id="bottomRightGlow" cx="100%" cy="100%" r="100%">
        <stop offset="0%"   stopColor="rgba(255,255,255,0.025)" />
        <stop offset="100%" stopColor="rgba(255,255,255,0)" />
      </radialGradient>
      <radialGradient id="leftMaskGlow" cx="50%" cy="35%" r="60%">
        <stop offset="0%"   stopColor="white" stopOpacity="1" />
        <stop offset="100%" stopColor="white" stopOpacity="0" />
      </radialGradient>
      <mask id="leftMask">
        <rect width="280" height="580" fill="url(#leftMaskGlow)" />
      </mask>
    </defs>

    <rect width="860" height="580" fill="url(#grid)" />
    <rect width="860" height="580" fill="url(#topLeftGlow)" />
    <rect width="860" height="580" fill="url(#bottomRightGlow)" />
    <rect width="280" height="580" fill="url(#dotPattern)" mask="url(#leftMask)" />

    <rect width="860" height="580" rx="24" fill="url(#auraGrad)" class="aura-overlay" />

    <rect x="0.5" y="0.5" width="859" height="579" rx="24" fill="none"
      stroke="url(#glowGradient)" strokeWidth="5"
      class="beam-blur" filter="url(#beamBlur)" />
    <rect x="0.5" y="0.5" width="859" height="579" rx="24" fill="none"
      stroke="url(#glowGradient)" strokeWidth="1.5"
      class="beam-main" />

    <rect x="0.5" y="0.5" width="859" height="579" rx="24" fill="none"
      stroke="url(#glowGradient2)" strokeWidth="4"
      class="beam-secondary-blur" filter="url(#beamBlur)" />
    <rect x="0.5" y="0.5" width="859" height="579" rx="24" fill="none"
      stroke="url(#glowGradient2)" strokeWidth="1"
      class="beam-secondary" />

    <path d="M 30 18 L 18 18 L 18 30" fill="none" stroke="#a855f7" strokeWidth="2" class="bracket" />
    <path d="M 830 18 L 842 18 L 842 30" fill="none" stroke="#a855f7" strokeWidth="2" class="bracket" />
    <path d="M 30 562 L 18 562 L 18 550" fill="none" stroke="#a855f7" strokeWidth="2" class="bracket" />
    <path d="M 830 562 L 842 562 L 842 550" fill="none" stroke="#a855f7" strokeWidth="2" class="bracket" />
  </svg>

  <div style={{ display: "flex", width: "100%", flex: 1 }}>
    <div
      style={{
        width: "280px",
        height: "100%",
        display: "flex",
        flexDirection: "column",
      alignItems: "center",
      justifyContent: "center",
      padding: "30px",
      position: "relative",
    }}
  >
    <span style={{ position: "absolute", top: "12%", left: "10%", fontFamily: "monospace", fontSize: "11px", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.09)" }}>{"</>"}</span>
    <span style={{ position: "absolute", top: "28%", right: "8%", fontFamily: "monospace", fontSize: "10px", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.07)" }}>{"{ }"}</span>
    <span style={{ position: "absolute", bottom: "22%", left: "8%", fontFamily: "monospace", fontSize: "9px", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" }}>{"// dev"}</span>
    <span style={{ position: "absolute", bottom: "38%", right: "6%", fontFamily: "monospace", fontSize: "10px", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>{"( )"}</span>

    <div
      style={{
        width: "120px",
        height: "120px",
        borderRadius: "999px",
        border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12)",
        display: "flex",
        alignItems: "center",
        justifyContent: "center",
        background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)",
        position: "relative",
      }}
    >
      <img
        src="data:image/png;base64,"
        alt="Anshraj Singh Thakur"
        style={{
          width: "110px",
          height: "110px",
          borderRadius: "999px",
        }}
      />
    </div>

    <div
      style={{
        display: "flex",
        flexDirection: "column",
        alignItems: "center",
        gap: "8px",
        marginTop: "24px",
        width: "100%",
      }}
    >
      <div
        style={{
          display: "flex",
          alignItems: "center",
          gap: "6px",
          padding: "5px 14px",
          borderRadius: "999px",
          background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)",
          border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12)",
          color: "#d4d4d4",
          fontSize: "11px",
          fontWeight: 600,
        }}
      >
        <span style={{ width: "6px", height: "6px", borderRadius: "999px", background: "#d4d4d4" }} />
        Full Stack Dev
      </div>
      <div
        style={{
          display: "flex",
          alignItems: "center",
          gap: "6px",
          padding: "5px 14px",
          borderRadius: "999px",
          background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)",
          border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.09)",
          color: "#d4d4d4",
          fontSize: "11px",
          fontWeight: 600,
        }}
      >
        <span style={{ width: "6px", height: "6px", borderRadius: "999px", background: "#8a8a8a" }} />
        AI / ML Student
      </div>
      <div
        style={{
          display: "flex",
          alignItems: "center",
          gap: "6px",
          padding: "5px 14px",
          borderRadius: "999px",
          background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)",
          border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.09)",
          color: "#8a8a8a",
          fontSize: "10px",
          fontWeight: 600,
        }}
      >
        <span style={{ width: "6px", height: "6px", borderRadius: "999px", background: "#e0e0e0" }} />
        Available for Opportunities
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div
    style={{
      width: "1px",
      height: "100%",
      background: "linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,0.12) 20%, rgba(255,255,255,0.12) 80%, transparent)",
    }}
  />

  <div
    style={{
      flex: 1,
      padding: "36px",
      display: "flex",
      flexDirection: "column",
      justifyContent: "center",
    }}
  >
    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column" }}>
      <span
        style={{
          fontSize: "11px",
          fontWeight: 600,
          letterSpacing: "0.18em",
          textTransform: "uppercase",
          color: "#787878",
          marginBottom: "6px",
        }}
      >
        Hey there! 👋 · About Me
      </span>
      <div
        style={{
          display: "flex",
          fontSize: "32px",
          fontWeight: 800,
          color: "#f0f0f0",
          margin: 0,
        }}
      >
        <span style={{ marginRight: "10px" }}>Anshraj Singh</span>
        <span style={{ color: "#8a8a8a" }}>Thakur</span>
      </div>
      <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "8px", marginTop: "8px" }}>
        <div
          style={{
            width: "32px",
            height: "2px",
            borderRadius: "999px",
            background: "linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.6), rgba(255,255,255,0.1))",
          }}
        />
        <span
          style={{
            fontSize: "10px",
            fontWeight: 500,
            letterSpacing: "0.12em",
            textTransform: "uppercase",
            color: "#4a4a4a",
          }}
        >
          Full Stack · AI/ML
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <p
      style={{
        fontSize: "13.5px",
        lineHeight: 1.7,
        color: "#8a8a8a",
        marginTop: "16px",
        marginBottom: 0,
        maxWidth: "500px",
      }}
    >
      I'm a passionate Full Stack Developer and AI/ML enthusiast who loves crafting clean,
      performant web experiences and intelligent applications. I blend design sensibility with engineering
      precision — turning complex problems into elegant, scalable solutions. Currently deepening my expertise in
      machine learning while building production-grade full-stack projects.
    </p>

    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "row", gap: "24px", marginTop: "20px" }}>
      <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", flex: 1, gap: "12px" }}>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "6px" }}>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "6px" }}>
            <span style={{ fontSize: "11px" }}>⚡</span>
            <span style={{ fontSize: "10px", fontWeight: 700, textTransform: "uppercase", letterSpacing: "0.14em", color: "#444" }}>
              Frontend
            </span>
          </div>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", flexWrap: "wrap", gap: "5px" }}>
            <span style={{ display: "flex", padding: "3px 10px", borderRadius: "999px", fontSize: "11px", fontWeight: 500, background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", color: "#8a8a8a" }}>HTML5</span>
            <span style={{ display: "flex", padding: "3px 10px", borderRadius: "999px", fontSize: "11px", fontWeight: 500, background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", color: "#8a8a8a" }}>CSS3</span>
            <span style={{ display: "flex", padding: "3px 10px", borderRadius: "999px", fontSize: "11px", fontWeight: 500, background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", color: "#8a8a8a" }}>React.js</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "6px" }}>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "6px" }}>
            <span style={{ fontSize: "11px" }}>🛠</span>
            <span style={{ fontSize: "10px", fontWeight: 700, textTransform: "uppercase", letterSpacing: "0.14em", color: "#444" }}>
              Backend
            </span>
          </div>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", flexWrap: "wrap", gap: "5px" }}>
            <span style={{ display: "flex", padding: "3px 10px", borderRadius: "999px", fontSize: "11px", fontWeight: 500, background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", color: "#8a8a8a" }}>Node.js</span>
            <span style={{ display: "flex", padding: "3px 10px", borderRadius: "999px", fontSize: "11px", fontWeight: 500, background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", color: "#8a8a8a" }}>Python</span>
            <span style={{ display: "flex", padding: "3px 10px", borderRadius: "999px", fontSize: "11px", fontWeight: 500, background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", color: "#8a8a8a" }}>REST APIs</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "6px" }}>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "6px" }}>
            <span style={{ fontSize: "11px" }}>🧩</span>
            <span style={{ fontSize: "10px", fontWeight: 700, textTransform: "uppercase", letterSpacing: "0.14em", color: "#444" }}>
              Frameworks
            </span>
          </div>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", flexWrap: "wrap", gap: "5px" }}>
            <span style={{ display: "flex", padding: "3px 10px", borderRadius: "999px", fontSize: "11px", fontWeight: 500, background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", color: "#8a8a8a" }}>Next.js</span>
            <span style={{ display: "flex", padding: "3px 10px", borderRadius: "999px", fontSize: "11px", fontWeight: 500, background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", color: "#8a8a8a" }}>FastAPI</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", flex: 1, gap: "12px" }}>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "6px" }}>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "6px" }}>
            <span style={{ fontSize: "11px" }}>🗄</span>
            <span style={{ fontSize: "10px", fontWeight: 700, textTransform: "uppercase", letterSpacing: "0.14em", color: "#444" }}>
              Databases
            </span>
          </div>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", flexWrap: "wrap", gap: "5px" }}>
            <span style={{ display: "flex", padding: "3px 10px", borderRadius: "999px", fontSize: "11px", fontWeight: 500, background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", color: "#8a8a8a" }}>MongoDB</span>
            <span style={{ display: "flex", padding: "3px 10px", borderRadius: "999px", fontSize: "11px", fontWeight: 500, background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", color: "#8a8a8a" }}>PostgreSQL</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "6px" }}>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "6px" }}>
            <span style={{ fontSize: "11px" }}>☁️</span>
            <span style={{ fontSize: "10px", fontWeight: 700, textTransform: "uppercase", letterSpacing: "0.14em", color: "#444" }}>
              Cloud & DevOps
            </span>
          </div>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", flexWrap: "wrap", gap: "5px" }}>
            <span style={{ display: "flex", padding: "3px 10px", borderRadius: "999px", fontSize: "11px", fontWeight: 500, background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", color: "#8a8a8a" }}>AWS</span>
            <span style={{ display: "flex", padding: "3px 10px", borderRadius: "999px", fontSize: "11px", fontWeight: 500, background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", color: "#8a8a8a" }}>Docker</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "6px" }}>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "6px" }}>
            <span style={{ fontSize: "11px" }}>🤖</span>
            <span style={{ fontSize: "10px", fontWeight: 700, textTransform: "uppercase", letterSpacing: "0.14em", color: "#444" }}>
              Tools & AI
            </span>
          </div>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", flexWrap: "wrap", gap: "5px" }}>
            <span style={{ display: "flex", padding: "3px 10px", borderRadius: "999px", fontSize: "11px", fontWeight: 500, background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", color: "#8a8a8a" }}>TensorFlow</span>
            <span style={{ display: "flex", padding: "3px 10px", borderRadius: "999px", fontSize: "11px", fontWeight: 500, background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", color: "#8a8a8a" }}>PyTorch</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
  </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div
  style={{
    height: "1px",
    background: "linear-gradient(to right, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,0.08), transparent)",
    margin: "0 36px",
  }}
/>

<div
  style={{
    padding: "16px 36px 24px 36px",
    display: "flex",
    flexDirection: "column",
    gap: "16px",
  }}
>
  <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "8px" }}>
    <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "6px" }}>
      <span style={{ fontSize: "11px" }}>💻</span>
      <span
        style={{
          fontSize: "10px",
          fontWeight: 700,
          textTransform: "uppercase",
          letterSpacing: "0.14em",
          color: "#444",
        }}
      >
        Tech Stack
      </span>
    </div>
    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexWrap: "wrap", gap: "6px" }}>
      {[
        { name: "C", color: "#00599C" },
        { name: "C++", color: "#00599C" },
        { name: "CSS3", color: "#1572B6" },
        { name: "HTML5", color: "#E34F26" },
        { name: "Java", color: "#ED8B00" },
        { name: "JavaScript", color: "#F7DF1E", textColor: "#000000" },
        { name: "TypeScript", color: "#007ACC" },
        { name: "Windows Terminal", color: "#4D4D4D" },
        { name: "Python", color: "#3776AB" },
        { name: "Firebase", color: "#FFCA28", textColor: "#000000" },
        { name: "Netlify", color: "#00C7B7", textColor: "#000000" },
        { name: "Vercel", color: "#000000" },
        { name: "Node.js", color: "#339933" },
        { name: "NPM", color: "#CB3837" },
        { name: "React", color: "#20232a" },
        { name: "React Router", color: "#CA4245" },
        { name: "React Hook Form", color: "#EC5990" },
        { name: "Redux", color: "#764ABC" },
        { name: "Three.js", color: "#000000" },
        { name: "TailwindCSS", color: "#06B6D4", textColor: "#000000" },
        { name: "MongoDB", color: "#47A248" },
        { name: "MySQL", color: "#4479A1" },
        { name: "Canva", color: "#00C4CC", textColor: "#000000" },
        { name: "Blender", color: "#F5792A" },
        { name: "Git", color: "#F05032" },
        { name: "GitHub", color: "#181717" },
        { name: "Docker", color: "#2496ED" },
        { name: "Notion", color: "#000000" },
        { name: "Prettier", color: "#F7B93E", textColor: "#000000" },
        { name: "Portfolio", color: "#FF7139" },
        { name: "Epic Games", color: "#313131" }
      ].map((tech) => (
        <span
          key={tech.name}
          style={{
            display: "flex",
            alignItems: "center",
            padding: "3px 8px",
            borderRadius: "4px",
            fontSize: "10px",
            fontWeight: 600,
            background: tech.color,
            color: tech.textColor || "#ffffff",
            border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)",
          }}
        >
          {tech.name}
        </span>
      ))}
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
</div>
```

<br />

```aura width=160 height=48 link="https://github.com/Anxhhhh" inline align=center
<div
  style={{
    width: "100%",
    height: "100%",
    display: "flex",
    alignItems: "center",
    justifyContent: "center",
    padding: "0 6px",
  }}
>
  <div
    style={{
      width: "100%",
      height: "100%",
      background: "linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0) 100%), #08080c",
      borderRadius: 24,
      border: "1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08)",
      display: "flex",
      alignItems: "center",
      justifyContent: "center",
      fontFamily: "Inter, sans-serif",
      position: "relative",
      overflow: "hidden",
    }}
  >
    <div
      style={{
        position: "absolute",
        top: 0,
        left: 0,
        right: 0,
        bottom: 0,
        background: "radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06) 0%, transparent 70%)",
      }}
    />
    <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "8px" }}>
      <img
        src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
        style={{ width: 16, height: 16, display: "block" }}
      />
      <span style={{ fontSize: "13px", fontWeight: 600, color: "#f0f0f5", letterSpacing: "-0.01em" }}>
        GitHub
      </span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```aura width=160 height=48 link="https://www.linkedin.com/in/anshraj-singh-thakur-349ab533b/" inline
<div
  style={{
    width: "100%",
    height: "100%",
    display: "flex",
    alignItems: "center",
    justifyContent: "center",
    padding: "0 6px",
  }}
>
  <div
    style={{
      width: "100%",
      height: "100%",
      background: "linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0) 100%), #08080c",
      borderRadius: 24,
      border: "1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08)",
      display: "flex",
      alignItems: "center",
      justifyContent: "center",
      fontFamily: "Inter, sans-serif",
      position: "relative",
      overflow: "hidden",
    }}
  >
    <div
      style={{
        position: "absolute",
        top: 0,
        left: 0,
        right: 0,
        bottom: 0,
        background: "radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(0, 119, 181, 0.15) 0%, transparent 70%)",
      }}
    />
    <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "8px" }}>
      <img
        src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
        style={{ width: 16, height: 16, display: "block" }}
      />
      <span style={{ fontSize: "13px", fontWeight: 600, color: "#f0f0f5", letterSpacing: "-0.01em" }}>
        LinkedIn
      </span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
